violations.text: Banana pops packaged in the food establishment are lacking label information (subingredients for muffin crumbles and peanut butter). Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Banana pops were removed from retail refrigerator and must not be made available for self-service until labels are corrected. Please email inspector proof of correction. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026

Food packaged in the food establishment are subingredients. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including subingredients), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025

The handwashing sink next to the ice machine area is in poor repair (hot water does not turn on). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Handwashing sink must be repaired. Please provide proof of repair to inspector. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2025

Establishment does not have a food safety manager certified with the Rhode Island Department of Health. Upon completion of food safety manager course, establishment must register the food safety manager with the Rhode Island Department of health. An application was given to the person in charge at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025

Bread and banana pops packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Establishment must not sell product until labels are placed on packaged food items. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025

Food packaged in the food establishment are lacking subingredients. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025

The handwashing sink next to the ice machine area is in poor repair(hot water does not turn on). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Handwashing sink must be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2025
